summary: Phase 4 Influencer Commission System - Backend: 100% (21/21 tests passed). Frontend: Working after bug fix. Fixed critical bug in CartPage.js where 'discountAmount' was undefined.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED - ReferenceError: discountAmount is not defined (line 400)

passed_tests: GET /api/admin/influencers - List all influencers
GET /api/admin/influencer-stats - Get global stats (total sales, commissions, pending)
POST /api/admin/influencers - Create influencer with auto-generated code
POST /api/admin/influencers - Create influencer with custom discount code
POST /api/admin/influencers - Duplicate email correctly rejected
GET /api/admin/influencers/{id} - Get influencer details with discount code info
PUT /api/admin/influencers/{id}/status - Pause influencer
PUT /api/admin/influencers/{id}/status - Reactivate influencer
PUT /api/admin/influencers/{id}/status - Ban influencer (also deactivates discount code)
PUT /api/admin/influencers/{id}/status - Invalid status rejected
Influencer discount code applies correctly to cart
Discount code linked to influencer_id field verified
GET /api/influencer/dashboard - Non-influencer gets 404
GET /api/influencer/dashboard - Influencer can view their own stats
Self-referral prevention logic verified in checkout code
Order cancellation commission reversal logic verified
GET /api/influencer/stripe/status - Non-influencer gets 404
POST /api/influencer/stripe/connect - Non-influencer gets 404
POST /api/admin/influencers/{id}/payout - Fails without Stripe connected
Admin endpoints require authentication (401)
Admin endpoints require admin role (403 for customers)
critical_code_review_comments: Influencer model properly defines: influencer_id, full_name, email, status, stripe_account_id, commission_type, commission_value, discount_code_id, total_sales_generated, total_commission_earned, available_balance
DiscountCode model extended with influencer_id field for linking
Order model extended with influencer_id, influencer_discount_code, influencer_commission_amount, influencer_commission_status
Commission calculation in checkout: net_order_value * (commission_value / 100) for percentage type
Self-referral prevention: Checks if influencer.email != user.email before calculating commission
Commission reversal on order cancellation: Updates order.influencer_commission_status to 'reversed' and deducts from influencer.available_balance
InfluencerCommission records created per order for tracking
Stripe Connect onboarding via /api/influencer/stripe/connect creates Express account
Admin payout endpoint validates: active status, stripe_account_id, stripe_onboarding_complete, minimum €1 balance
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test influencers during testing: Self Ref Influencer, Dashboard Test Influencer, Ban Test, Status Test, Test Influencer Custom, Test Influencer. Maria Influencer with code MARIA10 already existed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 Influencer Commission System fully tested. Key implementation: 1) Influencer model with stripe_account_id, commission_type, commission_value. 2) DiscountCode extended with influencer_id field. 3) Order extended with influencer_id, influencer_commission_amount, influencer_commission_status. 4) Commission calculated in checkout when influencer code is used. 5) Commission reversed on order cancellation. 6) InfluencerCommission records created per order. 7) Stripe Connect onboarding via /api/influencer/stripe/connect. 8) Admin can create influencers, update status, process payouts. 9) Bug fixed in CartPage.js: discountAmount was undefined, changed to appliedDiscount.discount_amount.

admin_create_influencer.details: POST /api/admin/influencers creates influencer with auto-generated or custom discount code

admin_list_influencers.details: GET /api/admin/influencers returns all influencers with stats

admin_influencer_stats.details: GET /api/admin/influencer-stats returns total_influencers, active_influencers, total_sales_generated, total_commissions_earned, total_pending_payouts

admin_update_status.details: PUT /api/admin/influencers/{id}/status supports active, paused, banned. Banning also deactivates discount code.

influencer_discount_code.details: Influencer codes (e.g., MARIA10) apply correctly to cart with 10% discount

influencer_dashboard.details: GET /api/influencer/dashboard returns stats, discount code, commission summary for logged-in influencer

self_referral_prevention.details: Code checks if influencer.email != user.email before calculating commission in checkout

commission_reversal.details: Order cancellation updates influencer_commission_status to 'reversed' and deducts from available_balance

stripe_connect.details: POST /api/influencer/stripe/connect creates Stripe Express account and returns onboarding URL

admin_payout.details: POST /api/admin/influencers/{id}/payout validates requirements and creates Stripe transfer

admin_influencers_ui.details: /admin/influencers page shows stats cards, influencers table, create dialog, details modal

influencer_dashboard_ui.details: /influencer/dashboard shows stats, discount code, Stripe connect button, commission summary

bug_fix_applied.issue: ReferenceError: discountAmount is not defined - caused cart page to crash when loading
bug_fix_applied.fix: Changed 'discountAmount' to 'appliedDiscount.discount_amount' in the discount display condition
bug_fix_applied.verification: Cart page now loads correctly and displays discount amount when code is applied
